Interface IuOidcTokenResponse

public interface IuOidcTokenResponse
Encapsulates the response from an OIDC token endpoint.
See Also:
  • RFC-6749 OAuth 2.0 Section 5.1

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getAccessToken()
    Gets the access token.
    String
    getError()
    Gets the error; SHOULD be non-null if getAccessToken() is null.
    String
    getErrorDescription()
    Gets the OPTIONAL error description.
    URI
    getErrorUri()
    Gets the OPTIONAL error URI.
    int
    getExpiresIn()
    Gets the number of seconds until the token expires.
    String
    getIdToken()
    Gets the OIDC ID token.
    String
    getRefreshToken()
    Gets the refresh token.
    String
    getTokenType()
    Gets the token type.

  • Method Details

    • getTokenType

      String getTokenType()
      Gets the token type.
      Returns:
      token type; i.e. "bearer"
      See Also:
      • RFC-6749 OAuth 2.0 Section 7.1

    • getAccessToken

      String getAccessToken()
      Gets the access token.
      Returns:
      access token

    • getIdToken

      String getIdToken()
      Gets the OIDC ID token.
      Returns:
      OIDC ID token

    • getRefreshToken

      String getRefreshToken()
      Gets the refresh token.
      Returns:
      refresh token

    • getExpiresIn

      int getExpiresIn()
      Gets the number of seconds until the token expires.
      Returns:
      number of seconds until the token expires

    • getError

      String getError()
      Gets the error; SHOULD be non-null if getAccessToken() is null.
      Returns:
      error code

    • getErrorDescription

      String getErrorDescription()
      Gets the OPTIONAL error description.
      Returns:
      error description

    • getErrorUri

      URI getErrorUri()
      Gets the OPTIONAL error URI.
      Returns:
      error URI
